focus: [D4-A4/D4] the gate never executes: design_gate/require_sk_interface_design are pseudocode; minimum executable PreToolUse hook that returns deny

graphEvents.label: What is the smallest executable PreToolUse gate that denies Open Design tool calls missing sk-design proof?
mcp-open-design has mandatory sk-design pairing prose and design_gate pseudocode, but no executing tool-boundary gate
The registered Codex PreToolUse hook can return decision:deny, but currently returns no decision for every non-Bash tool
The repo policy schema contains only bash denylist keys, so it cannot express guarded Open Design tools or skDesignGate requirements
The current hook intentionally fails open on errors, but an Open Design deny-by-default precondition must deny when gate validation errors
Guarded Open Design MCP calls must deny in PreToolUse before the Open Design daemon receives them when skDesignGate is absent or invalid
A validator error for a recognized guarded Open Design tool must deny rather than return an empty decision
Direct hook exercise denied Bash git reset --hard but returned empty decisions for open-design.start_run and mcp-open-design.start_run

label: mcp-open-design has mandatory sk-design pairing prose and design_gate pseudocode, but no executing tool-boundary gate
recommendation: Move the enforceable gate into .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/hooks/codex/pre-tool-use.ts or a guarded MCP proxy; markdown pseudocode stays advisory.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE once implemented as hook/proxy; ADVISORY while only prose.

label: The registered Codex PreToolUse hook can return decision:deny, but currently returns no decision for every non-Bash tool
recommendation: Evaluate Open Design tool names before the current Bash-only early return, and return decision:deny when a guarded tool lacks a valid skDesignGate.

label: The repo policy schema contains only bash denylist keys, so it cannot express guarded Open Design tools or skDesignGate requirements
recommendation: Add openDesignPreconditions to .codex/policy.json and CodexPolicyFile, seeded with create_artifact/write_file/create_project/start_run/cancel_run/delete_file/delete_project.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for known tool names; requires live payload discovery for namespace variants.

label: The current hook intentionally fails open on errors, but an Open Design deny-by-default precondition must deny when gate validation errors
recommendation: Give the Open Design precondition branch fail-closed error handling for recognized guarded tool names while leaving legacy Bash denylist failure semantics unchanged unless separately revisited.

label: sk-design proof primitives can seed skDesignGate, but the hook needs machine-readable fields, hashes, and expiry rather than prose
recommendation: Define skDesignGate fields for version, issuedAt/expiresAt, surface, taskType, register, workflowModes, loadedFiles hashes, routeTelemetryId, and proofDigest.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for token shape/freshness; ADVISORY for taste quality.

label: Guarded Open Design MCP calls must deny in PreToolUse before the Open Design daemon receives them when skDesignGate is absent or invalid
A validator error for a recognized guarded Open Design tool must deny rather than return an empty decision
Direct hook exercise denied Bash git reset --hard but returned empty decisions for open-design.start_run and mcp-open-design.start_run

direction: Treat mcp-open-design design_gate pseudocode as enforcement
reason: The only registered executable PreToolUse path is the Codex hook; the markdown design_gate is not invoked before tool execution.
